Silver crossbow slung across corset-laced hip, bolt-quiver strap crossing bare shoulder blade with moonlit buckle.
Violet rune-tattoos spiraling up forearms, igniting with spectral light as fingers curl mid-incantation gesture.
Black silk corset cinched with crimson ribbon, sheer lace sleeves embroidered with faint protective sigils.
Dual thin swords caught mid-draw from hip sheaths, blades reflecting candlelight across leather bodice.
Pearl-and-obsidian collar biting pale throat, single blood drop glistening at corner of crimson-lipped mouth.
Blessed silver whip coiled at thigh over thigh-high leather boots, handle wrapped in consecrated cloth.
Glowing fel-green sigil igniting in raised palm, casting eerie light across high cheekbones and shadowed eyes.
Sweeping gown of ink-black satin with trailing hem, violet velvet cloak clasped with skeletal-hand brooch.
Scythe held across shoulders with gossamer cloak flowing, ornate blade catching blood-moon's crimson glow.
Shadow-tendrils lifting from tattered cloak edges, curling around outstretched fingers like living smoke appendages.
Ritual chalice raised mid-incantation, crimson liquid glowing as spell-circle manifests faintly beneath bare feet.
Crown of black thorns pressing into brow, single raven perched on shoulder as familiar with glinting eyes.
Runic longsword strapped diagonally across back, hilt wrapped in worn leather with glowing amber pommel-stone.
Crimson blood-sigil drawn fresh across forehead and cheekbones, fingertips still stained with ritual ink.
Thigh-holster rig carrying blessed stakes and glass vials, strapped over torn fishnet and leather战skirt.

Spell-tome floating open beside her, pages turning themselves as violet arcane light spills across face.
Leather pauldron-and-bustier combination studded with tarnished silver, one shoulder bare and sigil-tattooed.
Black tears of witchcraft streaking down pale cheeks, eyes glowing white as shadow-wreath coils around shoulders.
War-fan spread open revealing painted blood-runes, held delicately before crimson-lacquered lips and smokey eyes.
Moth-swarm pouring from outstretched palm in spiraling cloud, wings catching moonlight like ash and silk.
Dagger-pair strapped to forearms with ritual bindings, blades etched with glowing protective script.
Circlet of dried black roses crowning unbound hair, single wilted petal falling past vampiric fanged smile.
Bat-membrane wings half-unfurled from bare shoulders, leathery surface traced with faintly luminous vein-patterns.
Ornate silver hand-mirror held aloft, surface reflecting not her face but swirling shadow-portal and crimson mist.
Spiked diadem of tarnished iron pressing into temples, dried blood-trails marking where points pierced pale skin.
Wand-and-grimoire suspended at hip in leather pouch, arcane focus glowing through worn fabric with pulsing light.
Lace half-mask covering upper face, tilted tricorn hat adorned with single raven feather and silver skull-pin.
Ink-black veins tracing up neck and jawline, visible aftermath of forbidden spellcraft corrupting porcelain flesh.
Soul-shard pendant pulsing violet at throat, captured essence swirling within faceted obsidian cage on chain.
Ragged gown of black feathers and bone fragments, hem trailing bone-dust as she moves through candlelit halls.
Crossbow bolt nocked and aimed, poison vial attached to silver tip glowing sickly green in darkness.
Ritual piercings connected by fine silver chains across brow, small bells chiming softly with each incantation.
Summoning circle burnt into floorboards at feet, still smoking as conjured familiar materializes in crimson flame.
Veil of gossamer silk embroidered with protection-sigils, pinned by bone-needle headdress into elaborate updo.
Fingers igniting with spectral blue flame mid-gesture, fire casting dancing shadows across leather weapon-harness and corset.

Raven-feather crown cascading down unbound hair, each plume tipped with tiny obsidian beads catching firelight.

Thigh-high boots with silver buckles ascending to leather garter-straps, holding concealed blessed daggers at each leg.
Violet spell-circle orbiting raised fingertips, arcane symbols rotating as eldritch energy crackles across knuckles and rings.
Single torn angel-wing folded behind shoulder, white feathers bloodstained and dragging across cathedral stone floor.
Wrought-iron choker with dangling skeleton-key, resting against pale throat above low-cut velvet and brocade bodice.

Blessed silver chain-whip coiled around waist over silk skirt, barbed links gleaming against midnight fabric.
Dusk-colored mist curling at bare feet, rising tendrils wrapping around calves as shadowy familiar-essence manifests.
Snake-coil tattoo winding up exposed right arm, scales rendered in metallic ink catching torchlight with each gesture.
Longbow of blackened wood held vertically, string humming with spectral tension as soul-infused arrow nocks itself.
Crescent-moon tiara with single ruby centerpiece, casting blood-red gleam across vampire-pale forehead and temple.
